idea-plugin.name: FigBridge — Figma to Code
idea-plugin.description:
FigBridge — Generate production-ready code from Figma designs

FigBridge connects your JetBrains IDE directly to Figma and generates clean, semantic HTML with either Tailwind CSS v4 or Custom CSS (BEM) from any frame in your Figma files.

Features

  • Figma OAuth Login — One-click browser login, no token copy-paste needed
  • Tailwind CSS v4 — Generates utility classes using the latest Tailwind syntax
  • Custom CSS with BEM — Generates clean HTML + separate CSS with BEM-style class names
  • Semantic HTML — Detects headers, navs, sections, buttons, inputs, links from Figma layer names
  • Auto Layout → Flexbox — Converts Figma Auto Layout to flex, gap, padding, alignment
  • Flex Wrap — Supports wrapped Auto Layouts with row/column gap
  • Absolute Positioning — Non-Auto-Layout frames position children with top/left
  • Design Tokens — Import Figma Variables as CSS Custom Properties (@theme or :root)
  • Asset Export — Downloads images as PNG/WebP and icons as SVG, deduplicated by content
  • Google Fonts — Auto-detects custom fonts and generates the link tag
  • Tailwind Snap — Convert arbitrary values (e.g. text-[18px]) to standard Tailwind classes
  • Frame Preview — Browse pages and frames with thumbnail preview
  • Keyboard Shortcuts — Ctrl+Alt+F to generate, Ctrl+Alt+R to refresh

Getting Started

  1. Open the FigBridge tool window (right sidebar)
  2. Click Connect Figma to log in via OAuth, or use a Personal Access Token
  3. Paste a Figma file URL or select a recent file
  4. Select a frame and click Generate Code
  5. Copy the code or export assets to your project

Supported IDEs

PhpStorm, WebStorm, IntelliJ IDEA, and all IntelliJ Platform IDEs (2025.1+)

Trial

14-day free trial with full access. After the trial, preview and inspect remain free. Code generation and asset export require a Pro license.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.1

  • Initial release
  • Figma OAuth login and Personal Access Token authentication
  • Tailwind CSS v4 and Custom CSS (BEM) code generation
  • Design token sync from Figma Variables
  • Asset export (PNG, WebP, SVG)
  • Frame tree browser with thumbnail preview
  • Google Fonts auto-detection
  • Tailwind Snap for converting arbitrary values
  • Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Alt+F, Ctrl+Alt+R)

action.description: Open FigBridge and generate code from selected Figma frame
